turns.q: How long does it normally take to ship and send a tracking number?

8:27 AM. You said:

How long does it normally take to ship and send a tracking number?

08:27 AM

Orders normally take 3 to 4 business days to process, and tracking is sent once the order ships. Orders placed after 10 AM PST may not ship until the following 3 to 4 business days, and processing can also take up to 48 hours excluding weekends and holidays.

08:28 AM

turns.q: Once it ships, how long is delivery?
turns.replyTail:
ent once the order ships. Orders placed after 10 AM PST may not ship until the following 3 to 4 business days, and processing can also take up to 48 hours excluding weekends and holidays.

08:28 AM
8:28 AM. You said:

Once it ships, how long is delivery?

08:28 AM

Once it ships, standard delivery in the continental US usually takes 4 to 5 business days for orders under $49, or 7 to 10 business days for orders over $49. For Canada, standard shipping is typically 14 to 21 business days.

08:28 AM

turns.q: Is there any way to speed it up if I need it sooner?
turns.replyTail:
49. For Canada, standard shipping is typically 14 to 21 business days.

08:28 AM
8:28 AM. You said:

Is there any way to speed it up if I need it sooner?

08:28 AM

We are not able to speed up or upgrade an order after it has been placed. Orders move into processing quickly, so if you need something sooner, the only possible option would be to cancel the current order if it is still eligible and place a new one. If it has already started processing, you would need to wait for delivery.

08:28 AM

f it has already started processing, you would need to wait for delivery.

08:28 AM
8:29 AM. You said:

What should I do if the tracking never updates?

08:29 AM

If tracking never updates, the best next step is to contact FedEx directly for the most up to date transit details. We do not offer refunds or credits for carrier delays once a package has left our warehouse.

If you want us to check your specific order status, please log in and we can look it up for you.

8:29 AM. You said:

How do I find my tracking link?

08:29 AM

Your tracking link is usually in the shipping confirmation email sent once your order ships. If you have not received that email yet, the order may still be processing.

You can also find general shipping info here: https://kutk.myshopify.com/pages/shipping-and-returns

8:29 AM. You said:

08:29 AM

Please log in so we can check your latest order status. If you still cannot access it after logging in, send your order number, the name used on the order, the email address used to place it, and your shipping or billing address.
